name: Fudgy Bonbons & Options
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces white baking bar or vanilla-flavored candy coating
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a saucepan, combine chocolate chips and butter. Cook and stir over low heat until melted and smooth.
3. Add condensed milk and mix well.
4. Sift flour into a measuring cup and level off.
5. Combine flour and nuts (if using) in a mixing bowl with the chocolate mixture and vanilla.
6. Shape 1 scant tablespoon of dough around each candy kiss, covering completely.
7. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet about 1 inch apart.
8. Bake for 6 to 8 minutes until soft and glistening.
9. Remove cookies from oven and let cool.
10. Heat vanilla-flavored candy coating and oil in a heatproof bowl.
11. Drizzle over cooled cookies.
Options:
1. For caramel centers: Melt 3 ounces of Kraft Caramels with 1 tablespoon water, pour onto a plate to form a thin layer, freeze until hard. Cut into strips and pieces when ready, place in the center of the dough before rolling.
2. Use bite-sized Reese's Peanut Butter Cups (cut into two pieces) and follow same steps as above.
3. Replace option 2 with crunchy peanut butter for a different flavor; use the back of a spoon to apply a dab onto the dough before rolling.
4. Add mint chocolate pieces (like Mintohs) for a light mint flavor, placing one in the center of each cookie before rolling.
Note: The cookies will harden after baking and should be cooled completely before drizzling with the candy coating.
